PASS N2-J3 exact SH-1' identity with the antisymmetric T_3 block determinant
PASS N2-EM4 common B4 tail shape proved for gamma_0..gamma_3
PASS N2-G3 fresh gamma_3 width <= 1e-17
PASS N2-OLD refreshed sigma_1..sigma_3 intervals lie inside the frozen N1 intervals
PASS N2-Q3 fresh qw_3 interval is strictly positive
PASS N2-DIR direct shifted Hankel determinant interval is strictly positive
